[[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|children={{ill|Empress Oshihime|WD=Q11076797}}; {{ill|Hiko Wanabe Oshijinmei|WD=Q106379651}}|father={{ill|Emperor Kōshō|WD=Q312841}}|mother={{ill|Yosotarashi hime|WD=Q10869205}}|relatives={{ill|Emperor Kōan|WD=Q312821}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11443593]] Wikidata name: Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{distinguish|Tarishihiko}} {{infobox royalty | name = Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto
（天足彦国押人命 / あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと） | native_name = | house = | image = | image_size = | caption = | relation = [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]]'s first prince | title = | full_name = | Rank = | respectful_title = | seal = | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = | spouse = | children = [[Hiko Omozu no Mikoto]] | mother = [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] | siblings = [[Shikame Hime no Mikoto]] | positions = }} '''Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto''' (天足彦国押人命, あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと, dates of birth and death unknown) was a [[:en:Japan|Japanese]] imperial family member from ancient times as recorded in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]. The name appears as "Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto" in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]], as "'''Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto'''" (天押帯日子命{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}) in [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], and as "Ametarashihiko Kuniobi no Mikoto" in other texts. Both sources lack records of specific deeds. He was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of the 5th [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]], elder brother of the 6th [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]], and maternal grandfather of the 7th [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]]{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. He is regarded as the ancestor of the [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] (丸邇氏), {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|qq=|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}}, and {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, among others. == Genealogy == {{Generations of Jimmu}} According to [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], he was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]] and [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] (Yoso Tarashihime no Mikoto). His younger brother was [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]]. The Nihon Shoki states that his daughter, {{ill|Oshihime|ja|押媛|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshihime|qq=}}, became the empress of Emperor Kōan and gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]] == Descendant Clans == In the Nihon Shoki, Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto is described as the ancestor of the {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和珥臣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Wani clan){{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. In the Kojiki, he is regarded as the progenitor of several clans, including the {{ill|Kasuga no Omi|ja|春日臣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga no Omi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ōya no Omi|ja|大宅臣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōya no Omi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Awata no Omi|ja|粟田臣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awata no Omi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ono no Omi|ja|小野臣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Omi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kakinomoto no Omi|ja|柿本臣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakinomoto no Omi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ichihiwi no Omi|ja|壱比韋臣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichihiwi no Omi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Ōsaka no Omi|ja|大坂臣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaka no Omi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Additional records name other clans, such as the {{ill|Kumano clan|ja|武社国造|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano clan|qq=|1=Kumano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11546287}} and the {{ill|Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja|伊勢飯高君|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Itaka no Kimi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. The [[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]] lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|qq=|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|qq=|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|children={{ill|Empress Oshihime|WD=Q11076797}}; {{ill|Hiko Wanabe Oshijinmei|WD=Q106379651}}|father={{ill|Emperor Kōshō|WD=Q312841}}|mother={{ill|Yosotarashi hime|WD=Q10869205}}|relatives={{ill|Emperor Kōan|WD=Q312821}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11443593]] Wikidata name: Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{distinguish|Tarishihiko}} {{infobox royalty | name = Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto
（天足彦国押人命 / あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと） | native_name = | house = | image = | image_size = | caption = | relation = [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]]'s first prince | title = | full_name = | Rank = | respectful_title = | seal = | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = | spouse = | children = [[Hiko Omozu no Mikoto]] | mother = [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] | siblings = [[Shikame Hime no Mikoto]] | positions = }} '''Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto''' (天足彦国押人命, あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと, dates of birth and death unknown) was a [[:en:Japan|Japanese]] imperial family member from ancient times as recorded in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]. The name appears as "Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto" in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]], as "'''Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto'''" (天押帯日子命{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}) in [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], and as "Ametarashihiko Kuniobi no Mikoto" in other texts. Both sources lack records of specific deeds. He was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of the 5th [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]], elder brother of the 6th [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]], and maternal grandfather of the 7th [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]]{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. He is regarded as the ancestor of the [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] (丸邇氏), {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}}, and {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, among others. == Genealogy == {{Generations of Jimmu}} According to [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], he was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]] and [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] (Yoso Tarashihime no Mikoto). His younger brother was [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]]. The Nihon Shoki states that his daughter, {{ill|Oshihime|ja|押媛|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshihime|qq=}}, became the empress of Emperor Kōan and gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]] == Descendant Clans == In the Nihon Shoki, Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto is described as the ancestor of the {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和珥臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Wani clan){{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. In the Kojiki, he is regarded as the progenitor of several clans, including the {{ill|Kasuga no Omi|ja|春日臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ōya no Omi|ja|大宅臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōya no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Awata no Omi|ja|粟田臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awata no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ono no Omi|ja|小野臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kakinomoto no Omi|ja|柿本臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakinomoto no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ichihiwi no Omi|ja|壱比韋臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichihiwi no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Ōsaka no Omi|ja|大坂臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaka no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Additional records name other clans, such as the {{ill|Kumano clan|ja|武社国造|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano clan|1=Kumano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11546287}} and the {{ill|Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja|伊勢飯高君|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. The [[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]] lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2010|chapter=Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|title=日本古代氏族人名辞典 普及版|publisher=[[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館]]|isbn=9784642014588|ref={{Harvid|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}} * {{ill|Inoue Shrine|ja|猪上神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoue Shrine|1=Igami Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929666}} * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} * {{ill|Tarishihiko|ja|多利思比孤|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarishihiko|qq=}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{translated page|ja|天足彦国押人命|version=101636071|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]] [[Category:Year of death unknown]] }} [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:Prince Ameoshitarashi]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[Category:Male imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Wani Clan]] [[Category:Ono clan]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]][[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]] {{wikidata link|Q11443593}}

Additional records name other clans, such as the {{ill|Kumano clan|ja|武社国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano clan|1=Kumano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11546287}} and the {{ill|Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja|伊勢飯高君|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. The [[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]] lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2010|chapter=Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|title=日本古代氏族人名辞典 普及版|publisher=[[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館]]|isbn=9784642014588|ref={{Harvid|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}} * {{ill|Inoue Shrine|ja|猪上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoue Shrine|1=Igami Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929666}} * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} * {{ill|Tarishihiko|ja|多利思比孤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarishihiko|qq=}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{translated page|ja|天足彦国押人命|version=101636071|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]] [[Category:Year of death unknown]] }} [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:Prince Ameoshitarashi]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[Category:Male imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Wani Clan]] [[Category:Ono clan]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]][[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]] {{wikidata link|Q11443593}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

[[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|children={{ill|Empress Oshihime|WD=Q11076797}}; {{ill|Hiko Wanabe Oshijinmei|WD=Q106379651}}|father={{ill|Emperor Kōshō|WD=Q312841}}|mother={{ill|Yosotarashi hime|WD=Q10869205}}|relatives={{ill|Emperor Kōan|WD=Q312821}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11443593]] Wikidata name: Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{distinguish|Tarishihiko}} {{infobox royalty | name = Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto
（天足彦国押人命 / あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと） | native_name = | house = | image = | image_size = | caption = | relation = [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]]'s first prince | title = | full_name = | Rank = | respectful_title = | seal = | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = | spouse = | children = [[Hiko Omozu no Mikoto]] | mother = [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] | siblings = [[Shikame Hime no Mikoto]] | positions = }} '''Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto''' (天足彦国押人命, あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと, dates of birth and death unknown) was a [[:en:Japan|Japanese]] imperial family member from ancient times as recorded in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]. The name appears as "Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto" in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]], as "'''Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto'''" (天押帯日子命{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}) in [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], and as "Ametarashihiko Kuniobi no Mikoto" in other texts. Both sources lack records of specific deeds. He was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of the 5th [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]], elder brother of the 6th [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]], and maternal grandfather of the 7th [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]]{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. He is regarded as the ancestor of the [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] (丸邇氏), {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}}, and {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, among others. == Genealogy == {{Generations of Jimmu}} According to [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], he was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]] and [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] (Yoso Tarashihime no Mikoto). His younger brother was [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]]. The Nihon Shoki states that his daughter, {{ill|Oshihime|ja|押媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshihime|qq=}}, became the empress of Emperor Kōan and gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]] == Descendant Clans == In the Nihon Shoki, Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto is described as the ancestor of the {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和珥臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Wani clan){{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. In the Kojiki, he is regarded as the progenitor of several clans, including the {{ill|Kasuga no Omi|ja|春日臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ōya no Omi|ja|大宅臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōya no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Awata no Omi|ja|粟田臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awata no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ono no Omi|ja|小野臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kakinomoto no Omi|ja|柿本臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakinomoto no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ichihiwi no Omi|ja|壱比韋臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichihiwi no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Ōsaka no Omi|ja|大坂臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaka no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Additional records name other clans, such as the {{ill|Kumano clan|ja|武社国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano clan|1=Kumano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11546287}} and the {{ill|Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja|伊勢飯高君|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. The [[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]] lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2010|chapter=Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|title=日本古代氏族人名辞典 普及版|publisher=[[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館]]|isbn=9784642014588|ref={{Harvid|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}} * {{ill|Inoue Shrine|ja|猪上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoue Shrine|1=Igami Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929666}} * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} * {{ill|Tarishihiko|ja|多利思比孤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarishihiko|qq=}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{translated page|ja|天足彦国押人命|version=101636071|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]] [[Category:Year of death unknown]] }} [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:Prince Ameoshitarashi]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[Category:Male imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Wani Clan]] [[Category:Ono clan]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]][[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]] {{wikidata link|Q11443593}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

[[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|children={{ill|Empress Oshihime|WD=Q11076797}}; {{ill|Hiko Wanabe Oshijinmei|WD=Q106379651}}|father={{ill|Emperor Kōshō|WD=Q312841}}|mother={{ill|Yosotarashi hime|WD=Q10869205}}|relatives={{ill|Emperor Kōan|WD=Q312821}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11443593]] Wikidata name: Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{distinguish|Tarishihiko}} {{infobox royalty | name = Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto
（天足彦国押人命 / あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと） | native_name = | house = | image = | image_size = | caption = | relation = [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]]'s first prince | title = | full_name = | Rank = | respectful_title = | seal = | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = | spouse = | children = [[Hiko Omozu no Mikoto]] | mother = [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] | siblings = [[Shikame Hime no Mikoto]] | positions = }} '''Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto''' (天足彦国押人命, あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと, dates of birth and death unknown) was a [[:en:Japan|Japanese]] imperial family member from ancient times as recorded in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]. The name appears as "Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto" in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]], as "'''Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto'''" (天押帯日子命{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}) in [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], and as "Ametarashihiko Kuniobi no Mikoto" in other texts. Both sources lack records of specific deeds. He was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of the 5th [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]], elder brother of the 6th [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]], and maternal grandfather of the 7th [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]]{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. He is regarded as the ancestor of the [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] (丸邇氏), {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}}, and {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, among others. == Genealogy == {{Generations of Jimmu}} According to [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], he was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]] and [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] (Yoso Tarashihime no Mikoto). His younger brother was [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]]. The Nihon Shoki states that his daughter, {{ill|Oshihime|ja|押媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshihime|qq=}}, became the empress of Emperor Kōan and gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]] == Descendant Clans == In the Nihon Shoki, Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto is described as the ancestor of the {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和珥臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Wani clan){{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. In the Kojiki, he is regarded as the progenitor of several clans, including the {{ill|Kasuga no Omi|ja|春日臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ōya no Omi|ja|大宅臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōya no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Awata no Omi|ja|粟田臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awata no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ono no Omi|ja|小野臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kakinomoto no Omi|ja|柿本臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakinomoto no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ichihiwi no Omi|ja|壱比韋臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichihiwi no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Ōsaka no Omi|ja|大坂臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaka no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Additional records name other clans, such as the {{ill|Kumano clan|ja|武社国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano clan|1=Kumano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11546287}} and the {{ill|Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja|伊勢飯高君|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. The [[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]] lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga He is regarded as the ancestor of the [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] (丸邇氏), {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}}, and {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, among others. == Genealogy == {{Generations of Jimmu}} According to [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], he was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]] and [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] (Yoso Tarashihime no Mikoto). His younger brother was [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]]. The Nihon Shoki states that his daughter, {{ill|Oshihime|ja|押媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshihime|qq=}}, became the empress of Emperor Kōan and gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]] == Descendant Clans == In the Nihon Shoki, Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto is described as the ancestor of the {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和珥臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Wani clan){{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. In the Kojiki, he is regarded as the progenitor of several clans, including the {{ill|Kasuga no Omi|ja|春日臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ōya no Omi|ja|大宅臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōya no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Awata no Omi|ja|粟田臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awata no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ono no Omi|ja|小野臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kakinomoto no Omi|ja|柿本臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakinomoto no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ichihiwi no Omi|ja|壱比韋臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichihiwi no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Ōsaka no Omi|ja|大坂臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaka no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Additional records name other clans, such as the {{ill|Kumano clan|ja|武社国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano clan|1=Kumano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11546287}} and the {{ill|Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja|伊勢飯高君|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. The [[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]] lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2010|chapter=Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|title=日本古代氏族人名辞典 普及版|publisher=[[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館]]|isbn=9784642014588|ref={{Harvid|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}} * {{ill|Inoue Shrine|ja|猪上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoue Shrine|1=Igami Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929666}} * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} * {{ill|Tarishihiko|ja|多利思比孤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarishihiko|qq=}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{translated page|ja|天足彦国押人命|version=101636071|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|children={{ill|Empress Oshihime|WD=Q11076797}}; {{ill|Hiko Wanabe Oshijinmei|WD=Q106379651}}|father={{ill|Emperor Kōshō|WD=Q312841}}|mother={{ill|Yosotarashi hime|WD=Q10869205}}|relatives={{ill|Emperor Kōan|WD=Q312821}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11443593]] Wikidata name: Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{distinguish|Tarishihiko}} {{infobox royalty | name = Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto
（天足彦国押人命 / あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと） | native_name = | house = | image = | image_size = | caption = | relation = [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]]'s first prince | title = | full_name = | Rank = | respectful_title = | seal = | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = | spouse = | children = [[Hiko Omozu no Mikoto]] | mother = [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] | siblings = [[Shikame Hime no Mikoto]] | positions = }} '''Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto''' (天足彦国押人命, あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと, dates of birth and death unknown) was a [[:en:Japan|Japanese]] imperial family member from ancient times as recorded in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]. The name appears as "Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto" in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]], as "'''Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto'''" (天押帯日子命{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}) in [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], and as "Ametarashihiko Kuniobi no Mikoto" in other texts. Both sources lack records of specific deeds. He was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of the 5th [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]], elder brother of the 6th [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]], and maternal grandfather of the 7th [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]]{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. He is regarded as the ancestor of the [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] (丸邇氏), {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}}, and {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, among others. == Genealogy == {{Generations of Jimmu}} According to [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], he was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]] and [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] (Yoso Tarashihime no Mikoto). His younger brother was [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]]. The Nihon Shoki states that his daughter, {{ill|Oshihime|ja|押媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshihime|qq=}}, became the empress of Emperor Kōan and gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]] == Descendant Clans == In the Nihon Shoki, Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto is described as the ancestor of the {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和珥臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Wani clan){{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. In the Kojiki, he is regarded as the progenitor of several clans, including the {{ill|Kasuga no Omi|ja|春日臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ōya no Omi|ja|大宅臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōya no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Awata no Omi|ja|粟田臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awata no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ono no Omi|ja|小野臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kakinomoto no Omi|ja|柿本臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakinomoto no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ichihiwi no Omi|ja|壱比韋臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichihiwi no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Ōsaka no Omi|ja|大坂臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaka no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Additional records name other clans, such as the {{ill|Kumano clan|ja|武社国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano clan|1=Kumano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11546287}} and the {{ill|Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja|伊勢飯高君|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. The [[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]] lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2010|chapter=Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|title=日本古代氏族人名辞典 普及版|publisher=[[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館]]|isbn=9784642014588|ref={{Harvid|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}} * {{ill|Inoue Shrine|ja|猪上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoue Shrine|1=Igami Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929666}} * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} * {{ill|Tarishihiko|ja|多利思比孤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarishihiko|qq=}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{translated page|ja|天足彦国押人命|version=101636071|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]] [[Category:Year of death unknown]] }} [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:Prince Ameoshitarashi]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[Category:Male imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Wani Clan]] [[Category:Ono clan]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]][[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]] {{wikidata link|Q11443593}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2010|chapter=Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|title=日本古代氏族人名辞典 普及版|publisher=[[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館]]|isbn=9784642014588|ref={{Harvid|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}} * {{ill|Inoue Shrine|ja|猪上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoue Shrine|1=Igami Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929666}} * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} * {{ill|Tarishihiko|ja|多利思比孤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarishihiko|qq=}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{translated page|ja|天足彦国押人命|version=101636071|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]] [[Category:Year of death unknown]] }} [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:Prince Ameoshitarashi]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[Category:Male imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Wani Clan]] [[Category:Ono clan]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]][[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]] {{wikidata link|Q11443593}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

[[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|children={{ill|Empress Oshihime|WD=Q11076797}}; {{ill|Hiko Wanabe Oshijinmei|WD=Q106379651}}|father={{ill|Emperor Kōshō|WD=Q312841}}|mother={{ill|Yosotarashi hime|WD=Q10869205}}|relatives={{ill|Emperor Kōan|WD=Q312821}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11443593]] Wikidata name: Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{distinguish|Tarishihiko}} {{infobox royalty | name = Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto
（天足彦国押人命 / あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと） | native_name = | house = | image = | image_size = | caption = | relation = [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]]'s first prince | title = | full_name = | Rank = | respectful_title = | seal = | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = | spouse = | children = [[Hiko Omozu no Mikoto]] | mother = [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] | siblings = [[Shikame Hime no Mikoto]] | positions = }} '''Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto''' (天足彦国押人命, あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと, dates of birth and death unknown) was a [[:en:Japan|Japanese]] imperial family member from ancient times as recorded in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]. The name appears as "Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto" in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]], as "'''Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto'''" (天押帯日子命{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}) in [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], and as "Ametarashihiko Kuniobi no Mikoto" in other texts. Both sources lack records of specific deeds. He was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of the 5th [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]], elder brother of the 6th [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]], and maternal grandfather of the 7th [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]]{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. He is regarded as the ancestor of the [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] (丸邇氏), {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}}, and {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, among others. == Genealogy == {{Generations of Jimmu}} According to [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], he was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]] and [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] (Yoso Tarashihime no Mikoto). His younger brother was [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]]. The Nihon Shoki states that his daughter, {{ill|Oshihime|ja|押媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshihime|qq=}}, became the empress of Emperor Kōan and gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]] == Descendant Clans == In the Nihon Shoki, Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto is described as the ancestor of the {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和珥臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Wani clan){{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. In the Kojiki, he is regarded as the progenitor of several clans, including the {{ill|Kasuga no Omi|ja|春日臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ōya no Omi|ja|大宅臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōya no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Awata no Omi|ja|粟田臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awata no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ono no Omi|ja|小野臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kakinomoto no Omi|ja|柿本臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakinomoto no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ichihiwi no Omi|ja|壱比韋臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichihiwi no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Ōsaka no Omi|ja|大坂臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaka no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Additional records name other clans, such as the {{ill|Kumano clan|ja|武社国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano clan|1=Kumano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11546287}} and the {{ill|Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja|伊勢飯高君|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. The [[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]] lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2010|chapter=Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|title=日本古代氏族人名辞典 普及版|publisher=[[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館]]|isbn=9784642014588|ref={{Harvid|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}} * {{ill|Inoue Shrine|ja|猪上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoue Shrine|1=Igami Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929666}} * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} * {{ill|Tarishihiko|ja|多利思比孤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarishihiko|qq=}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{translated page|ja|天足彦国押人命|version=101636071|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]] [[Category:Year of death unknown]] }} [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:Prince Ameoshitarashi]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[Category:Male imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Wani Clan]] [[Category:Ono clan]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]][[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]] {{wikidata link|Q11443593}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

[[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|children={{ill|Empress Oshihime|WD=Q11076797}}; {{ill|Hiko Wanabe Oshijinmei|WD=Q106379651}}|father={{ill|Emperor Kōshō|WD=Q312841}}|mother={{ill|Yosotarashi hime|WD=Q10869205}}|relatives={{ill|Emperor Kōan|WD=Q312821}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11443593]] Wikidata name: Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{distinguish|Tarishihiko}} {{infobox royalty | name = Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto
（天足彦国押人命 / あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと） | native_name = | house = | image = | image_size = | caption = | relation = [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]]'s first prince | title = | full_name = | Rank = | respectful_title = | seal = | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = | spouse = | children = [[Hiko Omozu no Mikoto]] | mother = [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] | siblings = [[Shikame Hime no Mikoto]] | positions = }} '''Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto''' (天足彦国押人命, あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと, dates of birth and death unknown) was a [[:en:Japan|Japanese]] imperial family member from ancient times as recorded in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]. The name appears as "Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto" in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]], as "'''Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto'''" (天押帯日子命{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}) in [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], and as "Ametarashihiko Kuniobi no Mikoto" in other texts. Both sources lack records of specific deeds. He was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of the 5th [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]], elder brother of the 6th [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]], and maternal grandfather of the 7th [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]]{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. He is regarded as the ancestor of the [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] (丸邇氏), {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}}, and {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, among others. == Genealogy == {{Generations of Jimmu}} According to [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], he was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]] and [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] (Yoso Tarashihime no Mikoto). His younger brother was [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]]. The Nihon Shoki states that his daughter, {{ill|Oshihime|ja|押媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshihime|qq=}}, became the empress of Emperor Kōan and gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]] == Descendant Clans == In the Nihon Shoki, Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto is described as the ancestor of the {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和珥臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Wani clan){{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. In the Kojiki, he is regarded as the progenitor of several clans, including the {{ill|Kasuga no Omi|ja|春日臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ōya no Omi|ja|大宅臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōya no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Awata no Omi|ja|粟田臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awata no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ono no Omi|ja|小野臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kakinomoto no Omi|ja|柿本臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakinomoto no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ichihiwi no Omi|ja|壱比韋臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichihiwi no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Ōsaka no Omi|ja|大坂臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaka no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Additional records name other clans, such as the {{ill|Kumano clan|ja|武社国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano clan|1=Kumano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11546287}} and the {{ill|Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja|伊勢飯高君|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. The [[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]] lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2010|chapter=Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|title=日本古代氏族人名辞典 普及版|publisher=[[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館]]|isbn=9784642014588|ref={{Harvid|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}} * {{ill|Inoue Shrine|ja|猪上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoue Shrine|1=Igami Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929666}} * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} * {{ill|Tarishihiko|ja|多利思比孤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarishihiko|qq=}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{translated page|ja|天足彦国押人命|version=101636071|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[simple:Prince Ameoshitarashi]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{wikidata link|Q11443593}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Male imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Ono clan]] [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]] [[Category:Wani Clan]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]] [[Category:Year of death unknown]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]] [[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]]

The [[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]] lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2010|chapter=Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|title=日本古代氏族人名辞典 普及版|publisher=[[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館]]|isbn=9784642014588|ref={{Harvid|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}} * {{ill|Inoue Shrine|ja|猪上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoue Shrine|1=Igami Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929666}} * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} * {{ill|Tarishihiko|ja|多利思比孤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarishihiko|qq=}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{translated page|ja|天足彦国押人命|version=101636071|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| }} [[simple:Prince Ameoshitarashi]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{wikidata link|Q11443593}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Male imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Ono clan]] [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]] [[Category:Wani Clan]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]] [[Category:Year of death unknown]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]] [[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]]

[[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|children={{ill|Empress Oshihime|WD=Q11076797}}; {{ill|Hiko Wanabe Oshijinmei|WD=Q106379651}}|father={{ill|Emperor Kōshō|WD=Q312841}}|mother={{ill|Yosotarashi hime|WD=Q10869205}}|relatives={{ill|Emperor Kōan|WD=Q312821}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11443593]] Wikidata name: Ametarashihiko kunioshihito no mikoto [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:53, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{distinguish|Tarishihiko}} {{infobox royalty | name = Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto
（天足彦国押人命 / あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと） | native_name = | house = | image = | image_size = | caption = | relation = [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]]'s first prince | title = | full_name = | Rank = | respectful_title = | seal = | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = | spouse = | children = [[Hiko Omozu no Mikoto]] | mother = [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] | siblings = [[Shikame Hime no Mikoto]] | positions = }} '''Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto''' (天足彦国押人命, あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと, dates of birth and death unknown) was a [[:en:Japan|Japanese]] imperial family member from ancient times as recorded in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]]. The name appears as "Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto" in [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]], as "'''Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto'''" (天押帯日子命{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}) in [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], and as "Ametarashihiko Kuniobi no Mikoto" in other texts. Both sources lack records of specific deeds. He was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of the 5th [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]], elder brother of the 6th [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]], and maternal grandfather of the 7th [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]]{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. He is regarded as the ancestor of the [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] (丸邇氏), {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}}, and {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, among others. == Genealogy == {{Generations of Jimmu}} According to [[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]] and [[:en:Kojiki|Kojiki]], he was the first {{ill|Imperial Prince|ja|%E7%9A%87%E5%AD%90|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Prince|qq=}} of [[:en:Emperor Kōshō|Emperor Kōshō]] and [[:en:Yosotarashi-hime|Yosotarashi-hime]] (Yoso Tarashihime no Mikoto). His younger brother was [[:en:Emperor Kōan|Emperor Kōan]]. The Nihon Shoki states that his daughter, {{ill|Oshihime|ja|押媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshihime|qq=}}, became the empress of Emperor Kōan and gave birth to [[:en:Emperor Kōrei|Emperor Kōrei]] == Descendant Clans == In the Nihon Shoki, Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto is described as the ancestor of the {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和珥臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Wani clan){{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. In the Kojiki, he is regarded as the progenitor of several clans, including the {{ill|Kasuga no Omi|ja|春日臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ōya no Omi|ja|大宅臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōya no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Awata no Omi|ja|粟田臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awata no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ono no Omi|ja|小野臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Kakinomoto no Omi|ja|柿本臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakinomoto no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ichihiwi no Omi|ja|壱比韋臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichihiwi no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and {{ill|Ōsaka no Omi|ja|大坂臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsaka no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Additional records name other clans, such as the {{ill|Kumano clan|ja|武社国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano clan|1=Kumano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11546287}} and the {{ill|Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja|伊勢飯高君|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. The [[:en:Shinsen Shōjiroku|Shinsen Shōjiroku]] lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi Prefecture]]. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2010|chapter=Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|title=日本古代氏族人名辞典 普及版|publisher=[[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館]]|isbn=9784642014588|ref={{Harvid|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * [[:en:Wani clan|Wani clan]] * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}} * {{ill|Inoue Shrine|ja|猪上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoue Shrine|1=Igami Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929666}} * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} * {{ill|Tarishihiko|ja|多利思比孤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarishihiko|qq=}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{translated page|ja|天足彦国押人命|version=101636071|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[simple:Prince Ameoshitarashi]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{wikidata link|Q11443593}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Male imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Ono clan]] [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]] [[Category:Wani Clan]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]] [[Category:Year of death unknown]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]] [[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]]

（天足彦国押人命 / あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと） | native_name = | house = | image = | image_size = | caption = | relation = {{ill|Emperor Kōshō|en|Emperor Kōshō|WD=Q312841|lt=Emperor Kōshō}}'s first prince | title = | full_name = | Rank = | respectful_title = | seal = | birth_date = Unknown | birth_place = | death_date = Unknown | death_place = | burial_date = Unknown | burial_place = | spouse = | children = [[Hiko Omozu no Mikoto]] | mother = {{ill|Yosotarashi-hime|en|Yosotarashi-hime|WD=Q10869205|lt=Yosotarashi-hime}} | siblings = [[Shikame Hime no Mikoto]] | positions = }} '''Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto''' (天足彦国押人命, あめたらしひこくにおしひとのみこと, dates of birth and death unknown) was a {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japanese}} imperial family member from ancient times as recorded in {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki}} and {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki}}. Both sources lack records of specific deeds. His younger brother was {{ill|Emperor Kōan|en|Emperor Kōan|WD=Q312821|lt=Emperor Kōan}}. The Nihon Shoki states that his daughter, {{ill|Oshihime|ja|押媛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oshihime|qq=}}, became the empress of Emperor Kōan and gave birth to {{ill|Emperor Kōrei|en|Emperor Kōrei|WD=Q313041|lt=Emperor Kōrei}} == Descendant Clans == In the Nihon Shoki, Ametarashihiko Kunioshihito no Mikoto is described as the ancestor of the {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和珥臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Wani clan){{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. Additional records name other clans, such as the {{ill|Kumano clan|ja|武社国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano clan|1=Kumano clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11546287}} and the {{ill|Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja|伊勢飯高君|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ise Itaka no Kimi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}{{Sfn|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010}}. The {{ill|Shinsen Shōjiroku|en|Shinsen Shōjiroku|WD=Q1045362|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku}} lists his descendants as follows: * **Left Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja|大春日朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkasuga no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yoshida no Muraji|ja|吉田連|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida no Muraji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Takebe no Asomi|ja|丈部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takebe no Asomi|1=Takebe no Asomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q55529997}} * **Right Capital Imperial Clan** - {{ill|Kurita no Asomi|ja|栗田朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurita no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Yamashiro no Asomi|ja|山城朝臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro no Asomi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Wani no Omi|ja|和邇部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wani no Omi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Various provinces** - Numerous lesser clans. == Worship == He is worshiped as the main deity of {{ill|Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|ja|小野神社 (南国市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|1=Ono Shrine (Nankoku)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q18991294}} in {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|WD=Q134093|lt=Kōchi Prefecture}}. The {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}}, who migrated to this area, established his worship as their ancestral deity{{Cite web |title=式内社調査報告 第二十三巻 {{!}} 皇學館大学出版部 |url=http://shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp/book/detail/342 |website=shuppan.kogakkan-u.ac.jp |access-date=2024-08-28 |publisher=皇學館大学 |author=式内社研究会}}. == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=|year=2010|chapter=Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|title=日本古代氏族人名辞典 普及版|publisher=[[Yoshikawa Kōbunkan|ja|吉川弘文館]]|isbn=9784642014588|ref={{Harvid|Ameoshitarashihiko no Mikoto|2010th year }}}} == See Also == * {{ill|Ono clan|ja|小野氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Wani clan|en|Wani clan|WD=Q11417873|lt=Wani clan}} * {{ill|Kasuga clan|ja|春日氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga clan|1=Kasuga Clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11513639}} * {{ill|Inoue Shrine|ja|猪上神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoue Shrine|1=Igami Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929666}} * {{ill|Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|ja|小野神社 (大津市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Shrine (Ōtsu)|1=Ono Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464225}} * {{ill|Tarishihiko|ja|多利思比孤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarishihiko|qq=}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{translated page|ja|天足彦国押人命|version=101636071|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[simple:Prince Ameoshitarashi]] [[ja:天足彦国押人命]] {{wikidata link|Q11443593}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Male imperial family members before the Kofun period]] [[Category:Ono clan]] [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]] [[Category:Wani Clan]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]] [[Category:Year of death unknown]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]] [[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]]
